name: Impossible Bacon Breakfast Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Brown, drain, and crumble the bacon. Place in the bottom of a greased 10-inch pie plate.
3. Top with chopped onions and shredded cheese.
4. In a blender, mix the remaining ingredients for 1 minute.
5. Pour the mixture over the top of the bacon and cheese.
6. Bake at 350°F until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean (35-45 minutes).
